evals.name: single-file
evals.prompt: Use the load-docs skill to load this file: /Users/tannt/Works/GIT/Personal/Sources/the-garden/.claude/skills/load-docs-workspace/fixtures/single-file/notes.md
evals.expected_output: Agent reads the file completely with the Read tool, then responds 'DONE'.

evals.name: folder-recursive-with-filter
evals.prompt: Use the load-docs skill to load every document in this folder: /Users/tannt/Works/GIT/Personal/Sources/the-garden/.claude/skills/load-docs-workspace/fixtures/mixed-folder
evals.expected_output: Agent recursively reads README.md, config.yaml, changelog.md, subdir/oncall-runbook.md, subdir/handler.py. Agent SKIPS node_modules/, .git/, and package-lock.json. Agent ends with 'DONE'.

evals.name: url
evals.prompt: Use the load-docs skill to load this URL: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/anthropic-cookbook/main/README.md
evals.expected_output: Agent fetches the URL with WebFetch and reads the content, then responds 'DONE'.

evals.name: no-args-asks-user
evals.expected_output: Agent does NOT read any files. Agent asks the user what to load. Agent does NOT respond 'DONE' (because nothing was loaded).

evals.name: multiple-mixed
evals.prompt:
Use the load-docs skill to load all of these:
- /Users/tannt/Works/GIT/Personal/Sources/the-garden/.claude/skills/load-docs-workspace/fixtures/single-file/notes.md
- /Users/tannt/Works/GIT/Personal/Sources/the-garden/.claude/skills/load-docs-workspace/fixtures/mixed-folder/README.md
- /Users/tannt/Works/GIT/Personal/Sources/the-garden/.claude/skills/load-docs-workspace/fixtures/mixed-folder/subdir/oncall-runbook.md
evals.expected_output: Agent reads all three files completely, tracks them with TodoWrite, then responds 'DONE'.
